# Skill Agent Guide — workspace-workshop

**Generated by `workspace.py generate`. Hand-edits are preserved via the `.artisyn/.generated-hashes.json` baseline; pass `--force-*` flags to discard them.**

## How to Use the SDK

The Artisyn Catalog SDK provides skill discovery and management:

```python
from artisyn_skill_sdk import aila_list_skills, aila_get_skill, aila_search_skills

# List all available skills
skills = aila_list_skills()

# Get a specific skill
skill = aila_get_skill('workspace-management')
print(skill['instructions'])

# Search skills
results = aila_search_skills(query='workspace')
```

### SDK API Reference

| Operation | Function |
|---|---|
| List all skills | `aila_list_skills()` |
| Search skills | `aila_search_skills(query, category, tags)` |
| Get skill content | `aila_get_skill(name)` |
| Get skill resource | `aila_get_skill_resource(name, path)` |
| Create new skill | `aila_create_skill(name, content, provider_name)` |
| Update skill | `aila_save_skill(name, content, provider_name)` |
| System diagnostics | `aila_self_diagnostics()` |
| List providers | `aila_describe_providers()` |

All functions are in `artisyn_skill_sdk.api`.
